_meta: Phase B — Stripe TEST-MODE fixtures for WEBHOOK-001 / BILLING-WEBHOOK-001. Generate with:  stripe fixtures bedrock-stripe-fixture.json  (test mode only). It creates a customer + subscription tied to bedrock-tenant-A; the webhook tests then attack the resulting events: replay (old timestamp), duplicate event id, and stripped/forged signature. Set ${PRICE_ID} to a test price. NEVER run against a live Stripe account.
